name: hcxpert-automation
description: Projeto de automação de testes - Desafio HCXpert

scripts.test: cypress run && node scripts/generate-report.mjs && node scripts/capture-api-evidencias.mjs
scripts.test:chrome: cypress run --browser chrome && node scripts/generate-report.mjs && node scripts/capture-api-evidencias.mjs
scripts.test:headed: cypress run --browser chrome --headed && node scripts/generate-report.mjs && node scripts/capture-api-evidencias.mjs && node scripts/evidence-manual.mjs
scripts.test:xray: cypress run && node scripts/generate-report.mjs && node scripts/upload-xray.mjs
